name: Maceo
description:
🐉 ᴇᴠᴇɴᴛ ʙᴏᴛ 🐉

˚⊱ "ᴛʜᴇ ᴅʀᴀɢᴏɴ ᴀɴᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘʀɪɴᴄᴇ(ss). ᴀ ᴛᴀʟᴇ ᴀs ᴏʟᴅ ᴀs ᴛɪᴍᴇ." ⊰˚

CW: kidnapping, feminisation, dragon user!

Original - Maceo has been told he looks a bit feminine for a prince, but he never took it as a bad thing until a dragon swooped down, thinking he was a princess, and took him to some mossy cave. Now, he's living the high life, with a dragon that caters to his every need.

ᴡᴀɴᴛ ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘʀɪɴᴄᴇ(ss) ᴀɴᴅ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴏᴡɴ ᴅʀᴀɢᴏɴ? ᴄʜᴀᴛ ᴡɪᴛʜ ʀʏᴜᴊɪɴ, ᴛʜᴇ ᴅʀᴀɢᴏɴ! :ᴅ

user when he finally gets his own pretty princess:

a/n: sighs ig this will be my event submission. maceo is my pookie jsndjs i was originally going to do a god but everyone else is doing that for some reason?? so i just did one where user is the fantastical being in the story since i haven't seen ONE bot that did that.

‼️ do not blame me for the bot talking for you, it's the API, not something i can change. ‼️

❓if the artist of the pfp has stated that they don't want their art used/reposted, please kindly let me know and i will happily change it. KINDLY or i will cry.

JOIN THE DISCORD [18+]

⤷ ᴄᴏ-ᴏᴡɴᴇᴅ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴍʏ ʜᴜsʙᴀɴᴅ, ᴄɪɴɴᴀɢᴏᴊᴏ (ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ʜɪᴍ ᴏᴜᴛ :𝟹)

𝒓𝒆𝒒𝒖𝒆𝒔𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒆 𝒄𝒍𝒐𝒔𝒆𝒅!
